hypothesis: Aggressive ordinal hybrid loss with coefficient=0.9 should improve NLL further than the 0.5 default
failure_reason: preflight_fail_fast: Stage-A tiny-overfit test loss diverged at step 12 (NaN gradient at coefficient=0.9). Per §17.1.1 preflight, full Stage-C budget NOT consumed.
lessons: Ordinal hybrid coefficient is sensitive at the upper end; tiny-overfit catches divergence before consuming the budget.
Future ordinal-hybrid sweeps should grid-search coefficient between 0.1 and 0.7, NOT extend to 0.9.
next_actions: Carry forward as known_failures: coefficient ≥ 0.9 is unstable.
